series_metadata.series_description: Documents associated with the selection of project architects, construction managers, consultants, and other specialty contracts. Includes, but is not limited to legal notices, Requests for Qualifications and Requests for Proposals, amendments, Question & Answer documents, and other correspondence related to the selection, selection process, and public notification of opportunity.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: converted electronic format, or project fiscal close. ; Electronic: Keep project fiscal close
